⚠ **Bug Report**

Please fill this template as completely as possible. The more context you give, the easier it is to reproduce and fix the issue.

## Pre-flight Checklist

- [ ] 1. I have confirmed that search engines cannot solve my problem
- [ ] 2. I have confirmed that existing issues cannot solve my problem
- [ ] 3. I will follow this template carefully
- [ ] 4. I will describe the issue clearly and concisely
- [ ] 5. I have read the [ECHO Docs](https://echonext.moe/zh/docs/) and still cannot solve it
- [ ] 6. I understand this is an open-source project and maintainers are not obligated to answer immediately, but I will ask politely
- [ ] 7. I confirm that I have read everything above

## Problem Summary

Give a one-sentence summary of the issue.

## Steps To Reproduce

Please list the steps in order.

1.
2.
3.
4.

What did you actually see?

## Expected Result

What did you expect to happen?
